response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS — aligning with core requirements — but their seniority far exceeds the junior/mid-level role, and their focus on niche technologies like DLang and embedded systems may indicate misalignment with the domain’s pragmatic, energy-construction focus. High on-site requirement is also a concern given no explicit mention of Berlin residency or willingness to be fully on-site.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven ability to integrate diverse data sources and build scalable web platforms
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching experience indicating strong collaboration
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of misalignment or turnover
Heavy focus on DLang and non-relevant embedded systems distracts from core stack needs
German language skill is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
